title: Datacube Extension
description: Dimensions and variables for gridded, multidimensional, or tabular data.

dimensions.description: Cube axes, e.g. lat, lon, time, or a domain axis like crop.

description.description: What the dimension is; define coded values here, or via reference_system or a sidecar.

type.description: Dimension type: spatial, temporal, bands, or a domain axis (e.g. crop, scenario).

reference_system.description: Controlled-vocabulary URI or label defining the dimension's values, when coded.

description.description: Stable definition and reading guidance for the variable.

dimensions.description: Axes this variable spans; omit when it spans all declared dimensions.

unit.description: Unit of measurement, preferably compliant with UDUNITS-2 or UCUM.
